sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: eGain Announces Solve 26 London: Premier Conference on AI-Powered Knowledge Management for Customer Experience Automation
feed.summary: eGain Corporation announced its Solve 26 London conference, a premier event focusing on AI-powered knowledge management for customer experience automation. The conference, scheduled for May 6-7, 2026, aims to address the "AI productivity paradox" by showcasing how trusted, AI-powered knowledge can drive measurable business outcomes. Attendees will hear customer success stories from Global 2000 companies, learn about eGain's product innovations, and participate in hands-on workshops.

feed.title: Genesco Amends Credit Agreement to Extend Maturity, Cut Costs
feed.summary: Genesco (GCO) announced a fourth amendment to its credit agreement, extending the maturity of its revolving credit facility to January 16, 2031, while maintaining current borrowing bases and collateral. This amendment relaxes financial covenants, shifts Canadian rates to Term CORRA, removes credit spread adjustments for domestic borrowings, and revises pricing, aiming to improve funding flexibility and lower financing costs. Spark's AI Analyst gives GCO a "Neutral" rating, citing strong revenue growth and free cash flow balanced by weak profitability.

feed.title: The Quiet Powerhouse: A Deep-Dive into Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY)
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) is presented as a "quiet powerhouse" in the American financial infrastructure, providing technology for over 7,500 community banks and credit unions. The article details its resilient business model with high recurring revenue, its strong financial performance, and its strategic transition to cloud-native architecture. JKHY's focus on service and its niche in the community banking sector are highlighted as key competitive advantages.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) Sets New 52-Week High - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) recently hit a new 52-week high of $220.12, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a target price of $219.82. The company surpassed Q1 earnings expectations and announced a $1.5 billion share repurchase plan. Despite strong institutional ownership, insiders have been net sellers in the last quarter.

feed.title: Trade Tracker: Karen Firestone sells Intuit and Booking Holdings
feed.summary: Karen Firestone, Executive Chairman of Aureus Asset Management, discussed her latest portfolio adjustments on CNBC's "Halftime Report." During the segment, she explained her decision to sell positions in Intuit (INTU) and Booking Holdings (BKNG). The article highlights her recent investment moves as part of the "Trade Tracker" series.

feed.title: Amgen (AMGN) expands obesity strategy with Ro collaboration on GLP-1 therapies
feed.summary: Amgen has partnered with Ro to launch a new program providing patients with access to Amgen's GLP-1 therapies for obesity, if approved. This collaboration aims to offer comprehensive care, including medication, coaching, and support, following a doctor's consultation. Ro's Body Program currently serves patients access to Novo Nordisk's Wegovy and Zepbound.

feed.title: Italy Tractor Market Research Report 2025-2030 Featuring Prominent Vendors - CNH Industrial, Deere & Co, AGCO, Kubota, SDF Group, and TAFE - ResearchAndMarkets.com
feed.summary: The Italy Tractor Market is projected to grow from 15,448 units in 2024 to 16,589 units by 2030, at a CAGR of 1.19%. Prominent vendors include CNH Industrial, SDF Group, AGCO Corporation, Kubota, and Deere & Company, with significant market share. The market is driven by government policies supporting organic farming and credit, while facing restraints from agricultural credit crunch and climate variability.

feed.title: GM plans to move Buick Envision production from China to U.S. in 2028
feed.summary: General Motors announced plans to shift production of the next-generation Buick Envision from China to the U.S. in 2028, moving it to the Fairfax Assembly plant in Kansas. This decision aims to strengthen GM's domestic manufacturing footprint and support U.S. jobs, following auto import tariffs and regulatory shifts. While the Envision will be assembled in Kansas for the North American market, production in China may continue for other international markets, and GM will continue shipping Envisions from China until the U.S. production begins.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) Valuation Check After Fortune Admired List Recognition And New Miami Terminal Project
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) has been recognized on Fortune's World’s Most Admired Companies 2026 list and is undertaking new projects like a LEED-focused terminal at PortMiami. Despite a 19.13% total shareholder return over the past year, the stock has seen recent declines, leading to a valuation check. The article suggests RCL is undervalued based on its P/E ratio of 18.6x compared to peers and a discounted cash flow model showing a 51.4% discount to estimated future value.

feed.title: Jack in the Box and The Hundreds Launch Limited Edition Collection Celebrating 75 Years
feed.summary: Jack in the Box is collaborating with The Hundreds to release a limited edition "Jack Was Here!" collection starting January 28, 2026, to celebrate Jack's 75th anniversary. This partnership aims to blend street culture, food, and fashion, strengthening brand visibility and attracting younger consumers. The collection will be available through four drops throughout the year, with early access for subscribers and members.

feed.title: 10 Materials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 10 materials stocks that experienced significant options activity, known as "whale alerts," during today's trading session. These alerts, tracked by Benzinga's options activity scanner, indicate large institutional trades that could signal potential trading opportunities or market sentiment shifts. The report details specific put and call options trades, their sentiment (bullish, bearish, or neutral), expiration dates, strike prices, and total trade value for companies like Albemarle, Barrick Mining, and The Mosaic Co.

feed.title: Fulton Financial stock hits 52-week high at $21.10
feed.summary: Fulton Financial Corporation's stock reached a new 52-week high of $21.10, indicating a positive trajectory and investor confidence with a 2.24% 1-year change. This surge follows the company's strong fourth-quarter financial results, which exceeded analyst expectations with adjusted earnings of $0.55 per diluted share and closely aligned revenue of $336.02 million. The bank also reported an increased net interest income of $266 million and maintained a stable net interest margin of 3.59%.

feed.title: McDonald’s bets big on hot honey and protein to bring in customers
feed.summary: McDonald's is expanding its menu with new hot honey sauce offerings and protein-focused sandwiches, including the Hot Honey Sausage Egg Biscuit and Bacon Hot Honey McCrispy Sandwich, starting January 27. These additions are part of a broader strategy to attract customers and increase traffic by focusing on emerging food trends and continuing to emphasize value. The chain's renewed focus on value has intensified competition within the fast-food industry, prompting rivals to introduce their own discount offerings.

feed.title: Iperionx Limited Receives USD 0.3 Million Prototype Purchase Order from American Rheinmetall
feed.summary: IperionX Limited secured a USD 0.3 million prototype purchase order from American Rheinmetall to produce 700 lightweight titanium components for U.S. Army heavy ground combat systems. These components, manufactured in the U.S. using 100% recycled titanium via IperionX's patented HAMR and HSPT technologies, aim to significantly reduce vehicle weight by 40-45% per component. This initiative supports U.S. Government efforts to reshore critical materials supply chains and enhance domestic manufacturing, potentially leading to a larger future agreement.

feed.title: First Hawaiian stock hits 52-week high at 28.29 USD
feed.summary: First Hawaiian Inc. (FHB) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $28.29, reflecting strong investor confidence and a positive market perception. The company has shown a 9.86% one-year price return and an impressive 10.92% gain over the last six months, with a P/E ratio of 13.77 and a 3.75% dividend yield suggesting it may be undervalued. This performance is supported by strong Q3 2025 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations, and positive analyst upgrades from Barclays, TD Cowen, and Keefe, Bruyette & Woods.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share at $343
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant shareholder in Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE:TPL), recently acquired 1 share of common stock for $343.48 on January 21, 2026. This purchase increases Horizon Kinetics' direct ownership to 3,487,696 shares. The transaction follows a period of several developments for Texas Pacific Land, including a Q3 2025 earnings miss, a strategic partnership with Bolt Data & Energy, a three-for-one stock split, and new "Overweight" analyst coverage from KeyBanc.

feed.title: General Motors (GM) Plans Shift of Buick Envision Production to Kansas
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) plans to move the production of its future-generation Buick Envision compact SUV from China to Kansas by 2028, largely due to U.S. tariffs. This shift also includes discontinuing the production of the all-electric Chevrolet Bolt in China within the next 18 months, indicating a change in GM's EV strategy. While GM shows strong revenue growth, its profitability and valuation metrics present a mixed financial picture, with an Altman Z-Score suggesting potential financial challenges.

feed.title: Hecate Energy Group to Become Public Company Through Business Combination with EGH Acquisition Corp.
feed.summary: Hecate Energy Group LLC, an independent energy infrastructure developer, announced a definitive business combination agreement with EGH Acquisition Corp. This agreement will result in Hecate becoming a public company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "HCTE". The announcement was made from Chicago on January 22, 2026.

feed.title: Arista Networks rips higher amid jump in call buying
feed.summary: Arista Networks experienced a significant stock surge, marking its best day of the new year, driven by a substantial increase in call option buying from traders. Goldman Sachs previously identified Arista as a top tactical trade, citing its strong position in data center spending and potential for a 20% rise. The company also benefits from Microsoft's expansion plans, a major client, although no direct news specific to Arista sparked the immediate rally, suggesting the options activity and broader market sentiment around data centers are key drivers.

feed.title: Trump sues JPMorgan Chase and CEO Jamie Dimon for $5B over alleged 'political' debanking
feed.summary: Donald Trump has filed a $5 billion lawsuit against JPMorgan Chase and its CEO Jamie Dimon, accusing the bank of politically motivated "debanking." The lawsuit alleges that JPMorgan Chase unilaterally closed several of Trump's and his affiliated entities' bank accounts in 2021 without warning, citing their belief that the decision was driven by a desire to distance itself from Trump's conservative political views following the January 6th protest. Trump's legal team is demanding a jury trial, claiming trade libel, violation of Florida’s unfair and deceptive trade practices act, and breach of implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing, in addition to alleging the bank placed him on an erroneous blacklist.

feed.title: Trump Sues JPMorgan, Dimon for $5 Billion Over Alleged Debanking
feed.summary: Donald Trump has filed a lawsuit against JPMorgan Chase & Co. and its CEO, Jamie Dimon, seeking at least $5 billion. Trump alleges that the bank ceased providing banking services to him and his businesses due to political motivations. The lawsuit claims trade libel, breach of implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing, and violation of Florida’s deceptive trade practices law, while JPMorgan denies closing accounts for political or religious reasons.

feed.title: United Airlines Earnings: Premium Seats Offset Economy Cabin Weakness
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings (UAL) saw an 8% decrease in operating profit in Q4 2025 despite a 5% increase in revenue and capacity, as rising premium cabin sales (up 11%) were offset by a 5% drop in main cabin revenue. The company's fair value estimate has been raised to $98 from $62, reflecting its strong revenue yield, though shares appear overvalued given the unlikelihood of maintaining outsize profits indefinitely.

feed.title: Bank of America, Citigroup stocks rise on potential 10% rate credit cards
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) and Citigroup (C) stocks saw gains after a report indicated both banks are considering offering credit cards with a 10% interest rate cap. This move is a response to President Donald Trump's demand for such a cap, despite concerns from banking executives about potential reduced credit availability. Other financial institutions like Capital One, American Express, and Synchrony Financial also rose on the news.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton launches new ETF focused on emerging market debt (BEN:NYSE)
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton (BEN) has introduced a new actively managed exchange-traded fund, the Templeton Emerging Markets Debt ETF (NYSE Arca: TEMD). This ETF is designed to focus on emerging market debt. It aims to provide investors with a strategy for accessing emerging markets debt that stands between fully U.S. dollar-denominated options.

feed.title: Cencora Elects Ellen Cooper to Its Board of Directors
feed.summary: Cencora, Inc. (NYSE: COR) announced the election of Ellen Cooper to its Board of Directors, effective January 20, 2026. Ms. Cooper, currently the Chairman, President, and CEO of Lincoln Financial, brings extensive expertise in risk management and leadership from a regulated industry. Her appointment aims to enhance Cencora's board in supporting the company's long-term sustainable growth and strategic positioning as a leading healthcare company.

feed.title: 3M ends PFAS manufacturing on schedule
feed.summary: 3M has successfully phased out the manufacturing of "forever chemicals" (PFAS) by the end of 2025, as announced in December 2022. While production of these chemicals has ceased, the company still anticipates using third-party products containing PFAS where regulatory or industry standards require them, and will evaluate PFAS-free alternatives. The wind-down involved significant financial implications, including job losses and legal settlements, but 3M's recent quarterly sales and earnings largely met analyst expectations.

feed.title: AT&T data breach settlement nearing approval. Here's how many people filed claims
feed.summary: A $177 million settlement for AT&T's two 2024 data breaches is nearing final approval. While nearly 100 million customers were eligible, only about 4.38 million filed claims by the December 18 deadline, a claims rate of 4.8%. If approved at the January 15 hearing, payments could be disbursed in the coming months, with varying compensation tiers depending on the breach and type of data exposed.

feed.title: The Truth About ICHRAs: Busting 5 Myths Holding Employers Back
feed.summary: This article debunks five common myths about Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangements (ICHRAs), highlighting their increasing popularity and benefits for employers of all sizes. It clarifies that ICHRAs are not just for small businesses, employees value choice in health plans, modern technology simplifies management, they are gaining long-term policy support, and they stabilize rather than destabilize ACA markets. The piece emphasizes ICHRAs as a flexible, cost-effective solution for employee benefits.

feed.title: The Truth About IDEXX Laboratories: Why Everyone on Wall Street Is Suddenly Watching
feed.summary: IDEXX Laboratories, a "quiet animal health giant," is gaining significant attention on Wall Street for its essential role in pet care diagnostics and lab technology. The company provides critical infrastructure for veterinary clinics, generating recurring revenue through diagnostic tests and software subscriptions, and is well-positioned to benefit from the increasing trend of pet owners treating their animals like family. While not a "meme stock," IDEXX is considered a strong long-term investment in the pet economy, despite its premium valuation.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Morgan Stanley (MS) After A 5-Year 214% Return?
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley (MS) has seen a significant 214% return over five years. This article critically evaluates its current valuation through two approaches: Excess Returns Analysis, which suggests it might be 15.5% overvalued, and a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) comparison, which indicates it could be somewhat undervalued. The article emphasizes that investors should consider various narratives and financial forecasts beyond single models to determine if the stock is still a viable investment.

feed.title: Bristol Myers buys into Janux’s ‘masked’ T cell engagers
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has partnered with Janux Therapeutics in a deal potentially worth $850 million to develop "masked" T cell engagers for solid tumors. Janux will receive $50 million upfront and lead preclinical development for the novel tumor-activated therapeutic, which aims to overcome the side effects and limitations of traditional T cell engagers. This deal serves as validation for Janux's technology, though investor confidence will hinge on future positive updates from its lead programs.

feed.title: 12 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Thursday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 consumer discretionary stocks that experienced significant movement during Thursday's intraday trading session. It details both top gainers, such as High Roller Technologies and Funko, and top losers, including MKDWell Tech and XWELL, providing their respective stock changes and market capitalizations. The information is presented in a concise format highlighting key financial metrics for each company.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Deepens Navan Tie Up To Grow Corporate Travel Relevance
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NasdaqGS:BKNG) has expanded its partnership with Navan, a corporate travel management platform, enhancing its API integration to offer more lodging options and discounts to business travelers. This strategic move aims to increase Booking.com's relevance in the corporate travel sector by providing greater control over spend and compliance. The deeper connection is expected to make Booking Holdings more competitive for companies seeking consistent booking options and cost savings.

feed.title: How Frontline’s $1.22 Billion ECO VLCC Fleet Upgrade Will Impact Frontline (FRO) Investors
feed.summary: Frontline plc is investing $1.22 billion in a fleet renewal, acquiring nine new scrubber-fitted ECO VLCC newbuilding contracts for delivery in 2026 and 2027. This move aims to modernize Frontline's tanker fleet with more fuel-efficient and environmentally focused vessels, sharpening its investment thesis towards younger tonnage. However, this large-scale investment introduces both opportunities for long-term positioning and risks related to execution, balance sheet strain, and increased leverage, which investors should consider.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Combines Chairman And CEO Roles As Valuation Draws Attention
feed.summary: Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) has appointed CEO Will Stengel as Chairman of the Board, combining the roles after current Chairman Paul Donahue's retirement. This consolidation aims to more closely align board leadership with day-to-day management as the company addresses financial challenges. Investors are advised to monitor capital allocation, acquisition/divestiture activities, and communication of priorities given the combined leadership structure and current valuation metrics.

feed.title: Western Digital Jumped 8.5% on AI Storage. Why the Stock Could Hit $380.
feed.summary: Shares of Western Digital (WDC) surged 8.5% following Bank of America analysts' increased price targets for memory makers, driven by a strong Q2 outlook and the exploding demand for high-capacity storage from the AI boom. CEO Irving Tan indicated 30% exabyte growth quarter-over-quarter and purchase order visibility through 2026, suggesting the market is underestimating the storage supercycle. TIKR's Advanced Valuation Model projects a potential upside of 57.7% to $381, anticipating a 13.2% revenue CAGR as Western Digital capitalizes on AI infrastructure growth.

feed.title: Rhode Island may ditch Mr. Potato Head license plates after Hasbro moves to Boston
feed.summary: Rhode Island lawmakers are considering discontinuing Mr. Potato Head license plates after Hasbro, the toy's creator, announced its move to Boston from Rhode Island. This legislative proposal stems from the belief that the state should not promote a company that is leaving, despite the license plates generating funds for the Rhode Island Community Food Bank. The plates, first issued in 2002, have raised nearly $50,000 for the food bank, sparking debate over economic self-respect versus charitable contributions.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group Announces Inaugural Class of Port Partners Business Accelerator Program in Seward, Alaska
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has selected 15 entrepreneurs for its inaugural 'Port Partners' business accelerator program in Seward, Alaska. This 10-week college-level course at AVTEC aims to strengthen participants' understanding of small business creation, leading to a pitch for $20,000 to kickstart their ventures. The program, part of Royal Caribbean Group's SEA the Future initiative, focuses on economic development and community impact in the destinations it visits.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation to Power Lucid's EV Manufacturing Facility in Saudi Arabia with Advanced Software Solutions | Corporate
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation announced a deepened collaboration with Lucid to support its electric vehicle manufacturing facility in King Abdullah Economic City, Saudi Arabia. Rockwell will deploy its FactoryTalk® MES software to optimize production and provide training programs, aligning with Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 for industrial growth and workforce development. This partnership aims to enhance operational efficiency, quality, and scalability for Lucid's EV production.

feed.title: Jack in the Box and The Hundreds Bring West Coast Nostalgia to Life with “Jack Was Here” Drop
feed.summary: Jack in the Box and LA-born streetwear brand The Hundreds are collaborating to launch the "Jack Was Here!" collection, celebrating Jack in the Box's 75th anniversary and honoring West Coast culture. This limited-edition drop, featuring a reworked Adam Bomb graphic with Jack's face, is the first of four planned for 2026. The collection aims to merge the heritage of both brands, emphasizing community and nostalgia, and will be available on January 28th.

feed.title: News Content Hub - Container vessel specialist Danaos dives into LNG with Alaska project investment
feed.summary: Danaos Corp, a container vessel specialist, has invested $50M in the Alaska LNG project, expanding its footprint into the energy sector. As part of the agreement, Danaos will also be the preferred tonnage provider for at least six LNG carriers to serve Glenfarne Alaska LNG, the majority owner and developer of the project. This move further diversifies Danaos's portfolio, which already includes container vessels and dry bulk carriers, and leverages its shipping expertise for LNG delivery to global customers, particularly in Asia due to Alaska LNG's strategic location.

feed.title: DraftKings, Flutter In Focus As BofA Sees Online Betting Driving Gaming Stocks Into 2026
feed.summary: BofA Securities analyst Shaun C. Kelley predicts that online sports betting will remain a key driver for the gaming sector into 2026, despite recent softer trends in Las Vegas, regional casinos, and Asia. While December data was soft across several segments, Kelley forecasts a strong Q4 for DraftKings due to hold rate surprises, facing less pressure than FanDuel. However, Las Vegas Strip and regional casino performance remains mixed, with some properties outperforming while others face competition and softer gaming revenue trends.

feed.title: FTAI Aviation Ltd. Announces Multi-Year Materials Agreement with CFM International, Inc. to Further Support CFM56 Engines
feed.summary: FTAI Aviation Ltd. has signed a multi-year agreement with CFM International, Inc. to provide component and repair support for CFM56 engines. This collaboration aims to extend the lifespan of CFM56 engines and support the global demand for narrowbody aircraft by enhancing repair and maintenance offerings, and securing OEM replacement parts and performance upgrades. The agreement is expected to bolster FTAI's ability to deliver cost-effective engine maintenance solutions worldwide.

feed.title: Former Illumina Executive Moves Into Quanterix’s Corner Office
feed.summary: Everett Cunningham, formerly chief commercial officer at Illumina, has been appointed the new CEO of Quanterix Corporation. He officially assumed the role and board membership on January 19, succeeding Masoud Toloue. Cunningham brings extensive experience from Illumina, Exact Sciences, Quest Diagnostics, GE HealthCare, and Pfizer, and his appointment coincides with Quanterix's strong financial guidance for 2025.

feed.title: BD and Ypsomed Expand Partnership to Target Growing Biologics Market
feed.summary: BD and Ypsomed have expanded their partnership to develop a 5.5 mL version of the BD Neopak XtraFlow Glass Prefillable Syringe, designed for full compatibility with Ypsomed’s YpsoMate 5.5 autoinjector. This collaboration addresses the rising demand for large-volume subcutaneous self-injection solutions for high-dose biologic medicines, aiming to simplify and make self-injection more convenient for patients. The initiative is expected to strengthen BD's market position in drug delivery systems, with syringe samples for studies anticipated by mid-2026.

feed.title: All About Ulta Beauty World 2026: Ticket Prices, Masterclasses and More
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty World is returning for its second annual expo on April 16, 2026, at the Orange County Convention Center in Orlando, Florida. The event will feature over 200 brands, food vendors, DJs, complimentary beauty services, and masterclasses with industry professionals like Jonathan van Ness and Donni Davy. Attendees can purchase general admission passes starting at $160, with options for masterclass access, and all ticket holders will receive a "swag bag" valued at over $2,000.

feed.title: Regions Bank taps new Tampa Bay wealth chief in aggressive Florida expansion
feed.summary: Regions Bank has appointed Rory Glenn, formerly of Citizens Bank, as its new private wealth management area executive in Tampa Bay. This move is part of the regional bank's aggressive expansion strategy in Florida, aiming to double its local adviser team within the next two years.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group (CFG): DA Davidson Raises Price Target to $73 | CFG Stock News
feed.summary: DA Davidson has increased its price target for Citizens Financial Group (CFG) to $73 from $65, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook, with the new target implying an 8.20% upside from the current price, based on the average forecast of 19 analysts. However, GuruFocus estimates suggest a potential downside based on its GF Value calculation.

feed.title: Live Nation Continues Expanding In LATAM, Invests In Bizarro Peru
feed.summary: Live Nation has expanded its presence in Latin America by acquiring a majority stake in Bizarro Live Entertainment's Peruvian operations. This partnership aims to develop Lima, Peru, into a significant touring destination for international, regional, and Spanish-language artists. This move reinforces Live Nation's decade-long investment strategy in the LATAM region, following similar partnerships with major promoters in Mexico, Colombia, Chile, and Argentina.

feed.title: General Electric Posts Q4 Beat, Announces In-Line 2026 Guidance
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) exceeded fourth-quarter expectations for revenue, margins, and earnings, as reported by Goldman Sachs. Analyst Noah Poponak reiterated a Buy rating and a $338 price target, noting GE's adjusted earnings of $1.57 per share against a consensus of $1.43. The company also provided 2026 guidance that was broadly in-line with estimates, projecting low-double-digit percentage revenue growth and operating profit between $9.85-10.25 billion.
